parameters.sqlQuery:
-- ============================================================
-- CAMPAIGN TRACKER — Targets T1
-- HOT SALE 2026 (2026-05-11 → 2026-05-18)
--
-- METODOLOGÍA:
--   Landing sessions : share_DOW × sesiones_plan_2026
--                      share = avg(HS/CM/BF ratio) por día de semana
--                      (sesiones landing / sesiones site reales 2025)
--   Landing funnel   : ratios internos por DOW (usuarios/ses,
--                      ses_cont/ses, ses_vip/ses, nsi/ses, etc.)
--                      de los 3 eventos T1 2025
--   Container        : promedio directo de sesiones por DOW
--                      + funnel interno (vip/ses, nsi/ses, trx/ses)
--                      NMV = trx × $138 (ASP HS2025)
--
-- Para nueva campaña T1: actualizar fechas en CAMPAIGN_DATES,
--   TS_SESSIONS, TS_NMV y el share si cambió
-- ============================================================

WITH

-- 1. Fechas de la campaña activa + número de día (D1..D8)
CAMPAIGN_DATES AS (
  SELECT
    date,
    FORMAT_DATE('%w', date) AS dow,
    ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY date) AS day_num
  FROM UNNEST(GENERATE_DATE_ARRAY(
    DATE '2026-05-11', DATE '2026-05-18', INTERVAL 1 DAY
  )) AS date
),

-- 2. Total Site 2026: sesiones planeadas
TS_SESSIONS AS (
  SELECT CAST(fecha AS DATE) AS date, SUM(sesiones_plan) AS sessions
  FROM `meli-sbox.PLANNINGMLA.KPIS_MLA_MKT`
  WHERE fecha IS NOT NULL
    AND sesiones_plan IS NOT NULL
    AND CAST(fecha AS DATE) BETWEEN DATE '2026-05-11' AND DATE '2026-05-18'
  GROUP BY 1
),

-- 3. Total Site 2026: NMV planeado
TS_NMV AS (
  SELECT CAST(fecha AS DATE) AS date, SUM(PLAN.TGMV_USD) AS nmv
  FROM `meli-sbox.PLANNINGMLA.DM_TARGETS_MLA`
  WHERE fecha IS NOT NULL
    AND PLAN.TGMV_USD IS NOT NULL
    AND CAST(fecha AS DATE) BETWEEN DATE '2026-05-11' AND DATE '2026-05-18'
  GROUP BY 1
),

-- 4. Sesiones plan 2026 por DOW: denominador para normalizar ratios históricos
DOW_TS_2026 AS (
  SELECT
    FORMAT_DATE('%w', date) AS dow,
    AVG(sessions)            AS avg_sessions
  FROM TS_SESSIONS
  GROUP BY 1
),

-- 5. Landing histórica diaria: suma full + parcial por fecha
LANDING_DAILY AS (
  SELECT
    t.DATE,
    SUM(t.NOT_LOG_USERS)       AS usuarios,
    SUM(t.SESSIONS)            AS sessions,
    SUM(t.LISTADO_TOTAL_USERS) AS ses_cont,
    SUM(t.VPP_TOTAL_USERS)     AS ses_vip,
    SUM(t.SI_168HS)            AS nsi,
    SUM(t.TRANSACTIONS_168HS)  AS trx,
    SUM(t.NMV_168HS)           AS nmv
  FROM `meli-bi-data.WHOWNER.DM_LANDING_ATTRIBUTION_CONTAINER_DEAL` t
  WHERE t.SITE = 'MLA'
    AND (
      -- HOT SALE 2025: hot-sale + promotional-home-mla
      (t.DATE BETWEEN '2025-05-12' AND '2025-05-19'
       AND t.LANDING_NAME IN ('hot-sale', 'promotional-home-mla'))
      OR
      -- CYBER MONDAY 2025
      (t.DATE BETWEEN '2025-11-03' AND '2025-11-11'
       AND t.LANDING_NAME IN ('cyber-monday', 'promotional-home-mla'))
      OR
      -- BLACK FRIDAY 2025
      (t.DATE BETWEEN '2025-11-26' AND '2025-12-03'
       AND t.LANDING_NAME IN ('black-friday', 'black friday parcial'))
    )
  GROUP BY t.DATE
),

-- 6. Ratios diarios por evento: share de sesiones + funnel interno
EVENT_DAILY_RATIOS AS (
  SELECT
    ld.DATE,
    FORMAT_DATE('%w', ld.DATE)                          AS dow,
    CASE
      WHEN ld.DATE BETWEEN '2025-05-12' AND '2025-05-19' THEN 'HS2025'
      WHEN ld.DATE BETWEEN '2025-11-03' AND '2025-11-11' THEN 'CM2025'
      WHEN ld.DATE BETWEEN '2025-11-26' AND '2025-12-03' THEN 'BF2025'
    END AS evento,
    SAFE_DIVIDE(ld.sessions, dts.avg_sessions)          AS ratio_sessions,
    SAFE_DIVIDE(ld.usuarios, ld.sessions)               AS f_usuarios,
    SAFE_DIVIDE(ld.ses_cont, ld.sessions)               AS f_ses_cont,
    SAFE_DIVIDE(ld.ses_vip,  ld.sessions)               AS f_ses_vip,
    SAFE_DIVIDE(ld.nsi,      ld.sessions)               AS f_nsi,
    SAFE_DIVIDE(ld.trx,      ld.sessions)               AS f_trx,
    SAFE_DIVIDE(ld.nmv,      ld.sessions)               AS f_nmv
  FROM LANDING_DAILY ld
  LEFT JOIN DOW_TS_2026 dts ON FORMAT_DATE('%w', ld.DATE) = dts.dow
),

-- 7. Promedio de ratios por (evento, DOW)
EVENT_DOW_AVG AS (
  SELECT
    evento,
    dow,
    AVG(ratio_sessions) AS ratio_sessions,
    AVG(f_usuarios)     AS f_usuarios,
    AVG(f_ses_cont)     AS f_ses_cont,
    AVG(f_ses_vip)      AS f_ses_vip,
    AVG(f_nsi)          AS f_nsi,
    AVG(f_trx)          AS f_trx,
    AVG(f_nmv)          AS f_nmv
  FROM EVENT_DAILY_RATIOS
  GROUP BY 1, 2
),

-- 8. Métricas finales por DOW: promedio de los 3 eventos
DOW_METRICS AS (
  SELECT
    dow,
    AVG(ratio_sessions) AS share,
    AVG(f_usuarios)     AS f_usuarios,
    AVG(f_ses_cont)     AS f_ses_cont,
    AVG(f_ses_vip)      AS f_ses_vip,
    AVG(f_nsi)          AS f_nsi,
    AVG(f_trx)          AS f_trx,
    AVG(f_nmv)          AS f_nmv
  FROM EVENT_DOW_AVG
  GROUP BY 1
),

-- 9. Container histórico diario: suma containers T1 2025
CONTAINER_DAILY AS (
  SELECT
    c.DATE,
    CASE
      WHEN c.DATE BETWEEN '2025-05-12' AND '2025-05-19' THEN 'HS2025'
      WHEN c.DATE BETWEEN '2025-11-03' AND '2025-11-11' THEN 'CM2025'
    END AS evento,
    SUM(c.C_UNIQUE_SESSION)  AS sessions,
    SUM(c.V_UNIQUE_SESSION)  AS ses_vip,
    SUM(c.SI_168HS)          AS nsi,
    SUM(c.TRANSACTION_168HS) AS trx
  FROM `meli-bi-data.WHOWNER.DM_CONTAINERS_DEALS_ATTRIBUTION` c
  WHERE c.SITE = 'MLA'
    AND (
      UPPER(c.CONTAINER_NAME) LIKE 'MK T1 HOT SALE%'
      OR UPPER(c.CONTAINER_NAME) LIKE 'MK T1 CM%'
    )
    AND c.DATE IN (
      '2025-05-12','2025-05-13','2025-05-14','2025-05-15',
      '2025-05-16','2025-05-17','2025-05-18','2025-05-19',
      '2025-11-03','2025-11-04','2025-11-05','2025-11-06',
      '2025-11-07','2025-11-08','2025-11-09','2025-11-10',
      '2025-11-11'
    )
  GROUP BY c.DATE, 2
),

-- 10. Número de día dentro de cada evento (D1, D2, ...)
CONTAINER_DAILY_NUMBERED AS (
  SELECT
    *,
    ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY evento ORDER BY DATE) AS day_num
  FROM CONTAINER_DAILY
),

-- 11. Benchmark por día: promedio de HS2025 y CM2025 para cada D1..D8
CONTAINER_BENCHMARK AS (
  SELECT
    day_num,
    AVG(sessions)                          AS avg_sessions,
    AVG(SAFE_DIVIDE(ses_vip, sessions))    AS f_ses_vip,
    AVG(SAFE_DIVIDE(nsi,     sessions))    AS f_nsi,
    AVG(SAFE_DIVIDE(trx,     sessions))    AS f_trx
  FROM CONTAINER_DAILY_NUMBERED
  GROUP BY day_num
),

-- 12. MS CTR benchmark (año en curso)
MS_CTR AS (
  SELECT
    CASE
      WHEN LOWER(LINE_ITEM_NAME) LIKE '%tachado%'
        OR LOWER(LINE_ITEM_NAME) LIKE '%celebrity%' THEN 'PRINCIPAL'
      WHEN LOWER(LINE_ITEM_NAME) LIKE '%alta%'      THEN 'HIGH'
      WHEN LOWER(LINE_ITEM_NAME) LIKE '%media%'     THEN 'MID'
      ELSE 'OTHER'
    END AS bucket,
    SAFE_DIVIDE(SUM(CLICKS_QTY), NULLIF(SUM(IMPRESSION_VIEWS_QTY), 0)) AS ctr
  FROM `meli-bi-data.WHOWNER.BT_ADS_DISP_METRICS_DAILY`
  WHERE EVENT_LOCAL_DT BETWEEN '2026-01-01' AND CURRENT_DATE()
    AND SIT_SITE_ID = 'MLA'
    AND PLACEMENT LIKE '%MAIN-SLIDER%'
    AND LINE_ITEM_NAME NOT LIKE '%SPLINTER%'
    AND CAMPAIGN_NAME NOT LIKE '%FD%'
  GROUP BY 1
),

-- 13. Targets finales por fecha
TARGETS_BY_DATE AS (
  SELECT
    cd.date,
    cd.dow,
    COALESCE(ts_s.sessions, 0)                                                               AS ts_sessions,
    COALESCE(ts_n.nmv,      0)                                                               AS ts_nmv,
    ROUND(COALESCE(dm.share, 0) * COALESCE(ts_s.sessions, 0))                               AS ldg_sessions,
    ROUND(COALESCE(dm.share, 0) * COALESCE(ts_s.sessions, 0) * COALESCE(dm.f_usuarios, 0)) AS ldg_usuarios,
    ROUND(COALESCE(dm.share, 0) * COALESCE(ts_s.sessions, 0) * COALESCE(dm.f_ses_cont, 0)) AS ldg_ses_cont,
    ROUND(COALESCE(dm.share, 0) * COALESCE(ts_s.sessions, 0) * COALESCE(dm.f_ses_vip,  0)) AS ldg_ses_vip,
    ROUND(COALESCE(dm.share, 0) * COALESCE(ts_s.sessions, 0) * COALESCE(dm.f_nsi,      0)) AS ldg_nsi,
    ROUND(COALESCE(dm.share, 0) * COALESCE(ts_s.sessions, 0) * COALESCE(dm.f_trx,      0)) AS ldg_trx,
    ROUND(COALESCE(dm.share, 0) * COALESCE(ts_s.sessions, 0) * COALESCE(dm.f_nmv,      0)) AS ldg_nmv,
    ROUND(COALESCE(cb.avg_sessions,             0))                                          AS cnt_sessions,
    ROUND(COALESCE(cb.avg_sessions, 0) * COALESCE(cb.f_ses_vip, 0))                         AS cnt_ses_vip,
    ROUND(COALESCE(cb.avg_sessions, 0) * COALESCE(cb.f_nsi,     0))                         AS cnt_nsi,
    ROUND(COALESCE(cb.avg_sessions, 0) * COALESCE(cb.f_trx,     0))                         AS cnt_trx,
    ROUND(COALESCE(cb.avg_sessions, 0) * COALESCE(cb.f_trx,     0) * 138.0)                 AS cnt_nmv,
    ROUND(SAFE_DIVIDE(
      COALESCE(cb.avg_sessions, 0) * COALESCE(cb.f_trx, 0) * 138.0,
      NULLIF(COALESCE(cb.avg_sessions, 0) * COALESCE(cb.f_nsi, 0), 0)
    ), 1)                                                                                    AS nasp
  FROM CAMPAIGN_DATES cd
  LEFT JOIN TS_SESSIONS        ts_s ON cd.date    = ts_s.date
  LEFT JOIN TS_NMV              ts_n ON cd.date    = ts_n.date
  LEFT JOIN DOW_METRICS         dm   ON cd.dow     = dm.dow
  LEFT JOIN CONTAINER_BENCHMARK cb   ON cd.day_num = cb.day_num
)

SELECT TO_BASE64(CAST(CONCAT(
  '{"dates":',         (SELECT TO_JSON_STRING(ARRAY_AGG(CAST(date AS STRING) ORDER BY date)) FROM TARGETS_BY_DATE),
  ',"to_dates":',      (SELECT TO_JSON_STRING(ARRAY_AGG(CAST(date AS STRING) ORDER BY date)) FROM TARGETS_BY_DATE),
  ',"ms":{',
    '"ctr_all":',        IFNULL(CAST((SELECT ROUND(SAFE_DIVIDE(SUM(CLICKS_QTY),NULLIF(SUM(IMPRESSION_VIEWS_QTY),0)),4) FROM `meli-bi-data.WHOWNER.BT_ADS_DISP_METRICS_DAILY` WHERE EVENT_LOCAL_DT BETWEEN '2026-01-01' AND CURRENT_DATE() AND SIT_SITE_ID = 'MLA' AND PLACEMENT LIKE '%MAIN-SLIDER%' AND LINE_ITEM_NAME NOT LIKE '%SPLINTER%' AND CAMPAIGN_NAME NOT LIKE '%FD%') AS STRING),'0'),
    ',"ctr_principal":', CAST(COALESCE((SELECT ROUND(MAX(IF(bucket='PRINCIPAL',ctr,NULL)),4) FROM MS_CTR),0) AS STRING),
    ',"ctr_high":',      CAST(COALESCE((SELECT ROUND(MAX(IF(bucket='HIGH',    ctr,NULL)),4) FROM MS_CTR),0) AS STRING),
    ',"ctr_mid":',       CAST(COALESCE((SELECT ROUND(MAX(IF(bucket='MID',     ctr,NULL)),4) FROM MS_CTR),0) AS STRING),
  '}',
  ',"total_site":{"sessions":',   (SELECT TO_JSON_STRING(ARRAY_AGG(ROUND(ts_sessions,0) ORDER BY date)) FROM TARGETS_BY_DATE),
    ',"nmv":',                    (SELECT TO_JSON_STRING(ARRAY_AGG(ROUND(ts_nmv,0)      ORDER BY date)) FROM TARGETS_BY_DATE),
  '}',
  ',"landing":{"sessions":',           (SELECT TO_JSON_STRING(ARRAY_AGG(ldg_sessions  ORDER BY date)) FROM TARGETS_BY_DATE),
    ',"share_sessions":',               (SELECT TO_JSON_STRING(ARRAY_AGG(ROUND(SAFE_DIVIDE(CAST(ldg_sessions AS FLOAT64), NULLIF(ts_sessions,0)),6) ORDER BY date)) FROM TARGETS_BY_DATE),
    ',"ctr":',                          (SELECT TO_JSON_STRING(ARRAY_AGG(ROUND(SAFE_DIVIDE(CAST(ldg_ses_cont AS FLOAT64), NULLIF(ldg_usuarios,0)),4) ORDER BY date)) FROM TARGETS_BY_DATE),
    ',"usuarios_landing":',             (SELECT TO_JSON_STRING(ARRAY_AGG(ldg_usuarios  ORDER BY date)) FROM TARGETS_BY_DATE),
    ',"ses_contenedor":',               (SELECT TO_JSON_STRING(ARRAY_AGG(ldg_ses_cont  ORDER BY date)) FROM TARGETS_BY_DATE),
    ',"ses_vip":',                      (SELECT TO_JSON_STRING(ARRAY_AGG(ldg_ses_vip   ORDER BY date)) FROM TARGETS_BY_DATE),
    ',"nsi":',                          (SELECT TO_JSON_STRING(ARRAY_AGG(ldg_nsi       ORDER BY date)) FROM TARGETS_BY_DATE),
    ',"transacciones":',                (SELECT TO_JSON_STRING(ARRAY_AGG(ldg_trx       ORDER BY date)) FROM TARGETS_BY_DATE),
    ',"nmv":',                          (SELECT TO_JSON_STRING(ARRAY_AGG(ldg_nmv       ORDER BY date)) FROM TARGETS_BY_DATE),
  '}',
  ',"container":{"sessions":',         (SELECT TO_JSON_STRING(ARRAY_AGG(cnt_sessions  ORDER BY date)) FROM TARGETS_BY_DATE),
    ',"nmv":',                          (SELECT TO_JSON_STRING(ARRAY_AGG(cnt_nmv       ORDER BY date)) FROM TARGETS_BY_DATE),
    ',"share_nmv":',                    (SELECT TO_JSON_STRING(ARRAY_AGG(ROUND(SAFE_DIVIDE(CAST(cnt_nmv AS FLOAT64), NULLIF(ts_nmv,0)),6) ORDER BY date)) FROM TARGETS_BY_DATE),
    ',"share_sessions":',               (SELECT TO_JSON_STRING(ARRAY_AGG(ROUND(SAFE_DIVIDE(CAST(cnt_sessions AS FLOAT64), NULLIF(ts_sessions,0)),6) ORDER BY date)) FROM TARGETS_BY_DATE),
    ',"cvr":',                          (SELECT TO_JSON_STRING(ARRAY_AGG(ROUND(SAFE_DIVIDE(CAST(cnt_trx AS FLOAT64), NULLIF(cnt_sessions,0)),4) ORDER BY date)) FROM TARGETS_BY_DATE),
    ',"ses_vip":',                      (SELECT TO_JSON_STRING(ARRAY_AGG(cnt_ses_vip   ORDER BY date)) FROM TARGETS_BY_DATE),
    ',"nsi":',                          (SELECT TO_JSON_STRING(ARRAY_AGG(cnt_nsi       ORDER BY date)) FROM TARGETS_BY_DATE),
    ',"transacciones":',                (SELECT TO_JSON_STRING(ARRAY_AGG(cnt_trx       ORDER BY date)) FROM TARGETS_BY_DATE),
  '}',
  ',"nasp":', (SELECT TO_JSON_STRING(ARRAY_AGG(nasp ORDER BY date)) FROM TARGETS_BY_DATE),
  ',"refreshed_at":"', FORMAT_TIMESTAMP('%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%S', CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(), 'America/Argentina/Buenos_Aires'), '"}'
) AS BYTES)) AS data_b64
